title: Eric Ries on TikTok: 'I've Been Campaigning to Support Indies With the Incorruptible Book Launch'
summary: On the eve of Independent Bookstore Day, Eric posts a TikTok inviting readers to celebrate at indies and to join the launch street team.
blockquote:
April 25 is Independent Bookstores Day here in the US. I've been campaiging to support indies with the Incorruptible book launch and invite you to join in the celebrations happening tomorrow. 

What's your favorite bookstore?  

P.S. If you want to join the street team for launch that I mention, link is here: https://forms.gle/586NN1eqQFJDxSAx8
